case_title: KRISTINE XIE VS. UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF XIE, KRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XIE, KRISTINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSE, ALLISON YUET $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,955.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY XIE, KRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY TSE, ALLISON YUET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CORRECTING 3/8/16 ENTRY AND ENTERING DISMISSAL OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY ONLY; AND REINSTATING APR-21-2016 TRIAL DATE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TSE, ALLISON YUET
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ***FEE FOR SERVICE:80.00*** SERVED JAN-26-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TSE, ALLISON YUET
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-21-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ***FEE FOR SERVICE: 95.00*** SERVED JAN-26-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2016 - JUDGMENT.
